zh.lifeSummary: 當Hiram Colbroth於1831年出生在美國緬因州阿盧斯圖可捨曼時，他的父親Royal B. Coolbroth31歲，母親Mehitable Morrison27歲。他於1854年4月11日與Nancy Drew在美國緬因州阿盧斯圖可斯米納結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他在美國緬因州阿盧斯圖可住了大約10年且在美國緬因州阿盧斯圖可盧德洛福住了大約10年。他去世於1887年3月27日在美國明尼蘇達州潘恩潘恩 希迪享年56歲，埋葬在美國明尼蘇達州華盛頓斯利沃特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hiram Colbroth于1831年出生在美国缅因州阿盧斯圖可捨曼时，他的父亲Royal B. Coolbroth31岁，母亲Mehitable Morrison27岁。他于1854年4月11日与Nancy Drew在美国缅因州阿盧斯圖可斯米納结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他在美国缅因州阿盧斯圖可住了大约10年且在美国缅因州阿盧斯圖可盧德洛福住了大约10年。他去世于1887年3月27日在美国明尼苏达州潘恩潘恩 希迪享年56岁，埋葬在美国明尼苏达州華盛頓斯利沃特。

nameMeanings.name: Hiram
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by a king of Tyre who is repeatedly mentioned in the Bible (2 Samuel 2:11; 1 Kings 5; 9:11; 10:11; 1 Chronicles 14:1; 2 Chronicles 2:11) as supplying wood, craftsmen, and money to enable David and Solomon to construct various buildings. It was also the name of a craftsman of Tyre who worked in brass for Solomon (1 Kings 7:13). The name is presumably of Semitic origin, but is probably a Phoenician name; if it is Hebrew, it may be a shortened form of Ahiram ‘brother of the exalted’. In England, the name was taken up by the Puritans in the 17th century, but soon dropped out of regular use. It is still used occasionally in the United States.

historicEvents.title: The Black Hawk War
historicEvents.description: Convinced that a group of Native American tribes were hostile, The United States formed a frontier militia to stop them in their tracks. Even though Black Hawk was hoping to avoid bloodshed while trying to resettle on tribal land, U.S. officials opened fire on the Native Americans. Black Hawk then responded to this confrontation by successfully attacking the militia at the Battle of Stillman's Run and then left northward. After a few months the militia caught up with Black Hawk and his men and defeated them at the Battle of Wisconsin Heights. While being weakened by hunger, injuries and desertion, Black Hawk and the rest of the many native survivors retreated towards the Mississippi. Unfortunately, Black Hawk and other leaders were later captured when they surrendered to the US forces and were then imprisoned for a year.
Historical Boundaries: 1832: Penobscot, Maine, United States 1839: Aroostook, Maine, United States
U.S. acquires vast tracts of Mexican territory in wake of Mexican War including California and New Mexico.

historicEvents.title: First State to Attempt Prohibition
historicEvents.description: "In 1851, Maine outlawed the sale of alcohol, allowing exceptions only for ""medicinal, mechanical, and manufacturing purposes"". This made Maine the first state to experiment with prohibition. Neal Dow, mayor of Portland, believed that alcohol was linked to slavery and was also convinced by the Christian temperance movement. Dow ran into problems later for his anti-immigration rhetoric against the Irish, and also for breaking his own prohibition laws; although not a designated ""purchaser"", Dow personally purchased alcohol to distribute to local doctors, violating a technicality. As the citizens turned against him, Dow eventually ordered soldiers to fire on protesters. This marked a sharp decline in Dow's political career, and the Maine Law was repealed by 1856. Aspects of the law would remain in tact, however, and ultimately paved the way for the 18th Amendment, which prohibited alcohol on the national level."
historicEvents.urlTitle: Smithsonian - Why Was Maine the First State to Try Prohibition?

historicEvents.title: The Dakota Conflict/War
historicEvents.description: The Dakota War was an armed conflict between the United States and several bands of Dakota Native Americans. It began along the Minnesota River four years after Minnesota was admitted as a state. The Dakota made attacks on hundreds of settlers, which resulted in their deaths. A military tribunal sentenced 303 Dakota men to death for their crimes but 264 of them were exonerated. The remaining 38 were apart of a mass hanging on December 26 that same year. It was the largest mass execution in United States history.
Historical Boundaries: 1869: Pine, Minnesota, United States

historicEvents.title: A Treaty with Hawaii
historicEvents.description: In the Mid 1870s, The United States sought out the Kingdom of Hawaii to make a free trade agreement. The Treaty gave the Hawaiians access to the United States agricultural markets and it gave the United States a part of land which later became Pearl Harbor.

historicEvents.title: A New Civil Rights Act
historicEvents.description: During the response to civil rights violations to African Americans, the bill was passed giving African Americans equal treatment in public accommodations, public transportation, and to prohibit exclusion from jury duty. While many in the public opposed this law, the African Americans greatly favored it.

en.lifeSummary: When Hiram Colbroth was born in 1831, in Sherman, Aroostook, Maine, United States, his father, Royal B. Coolbroth, was 31 and his mother, Mehitable Morrison, was 27. He married Nancy Drew on 11 April 1854, in Smyrna, Aroostook, Maine, United States. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He lived in Aroostook, Maine, United States for about 10 years and Ludlow, Aroostook, Maine, United States for about 10 years. He died on 27 March 1887, in Pine City, Pine, Minnesota, United States, at the age of 56, and was buried in Stillwater, Washington, Minnesota, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hiram Colbroth est né en 1831, à Sherman, Aroostook, Maine, États-Unis, son père, Royal B. Coolbroth, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Mehitable Morrison, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Nancy Drew le 11 avril 1854, à Smyrna, Aroostook, Maine, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il a vécu à Aroostook, Maine, États-Unis pendant environ 10 ans et à Ludlow, Aroostook, Maine, États-Unis pendant environ 10 ans. Il est décédé le 27 mars 1887, à Pine City, Pine, Minnesota, États-Unis, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Stillwater, Washington, Minnesota, États-Unis.

de.Pine City, Pine, Minnesota, United State: Pine City, Pine, Minnesota, Vereinigte Staaten
de.lifeSummary: Als Hiram Colbroth 1831 in Sherman, Aroostook, Maine, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war sein Vater Royal B. Coolbroth 31 und seine Mutter Mehitable Morrison 27. Er hat am 11. April 1854 in Smyrna, Aroostook, Maine, Vereinigte Staaten Nancy Drew geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er hat ungefähr 10 Jahre lang in Aroostook, Maine, Vereinigte Staaten und ungefähr 10 Jahre lang in Ludlow, Aroostook, Maine, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Er starb am 27. März 1887 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Pine City, Pine, Minnesota, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Stillwater, Washington, Minnesota, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hiram Colbroth è nato il nel 1831 nel Sherman, Aroostook, Maine, Stati Uniti d'America, il suo padre, Royal B. Coolbroth, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Mehitable Morrison, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Nancy Drew il 11 aprile 1854, nel Smyrna, Aroostook, Maine, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Vissuto a Aroostook, Maine, Stati Uniti d'America per circa 10 anni e nel Ludlow, Aroostook, Maine, Stati Uniti d'America per circa 10 anni. ja.lifeSummary: Hiram Colbrothが1831年にアメリカ合衆国メイン州アルーストオクシェルマンで生まれた時，父Royal B. Coolbrothは31歳，母Mehitable Morrisonは27歳であった。1854年4月11日にアメリカ合衆国メイン州アルーストオクスムイルナでNancy Drewと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼はアメリカ合衆国メイン州アルーストオクに約10年間，アメリカ合衆国メイン州アルーストオクルドロウに約10年間住んでいた。彼は1887年3月27日にアメリカ合衆国ミネソタ州ピンピン シトイで56歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ミネソタ州ワシュイントンスティルワターにて埋葬された。

ko.Pine City, Pine, Minnesota, United State: 미국 미네소타 주 핀 핀 시티
ko.lifeSummary: Hiram Colbroth(이)가 1831년 미국 메인 주 아루스투크 셔먼에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Royal B. Coolbroth(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Mehitable Morrison(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1854년 4월 11일 미국 메인 주 아루스투크 스미른아에서 Nancy Drew(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 미국 메인 주 아루스투크에서 약 10년, 미국 메인 주 아루스투크 루들로에서 약 10년 동안 살았다. 그는 1887년 3월 27일 미국 미네소타 주 핀 핀 시티에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 미네소타 주 와신그턴 스틸왓어에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hiram Colbroth nasceu em 1831, em Sherman, Aroostook, Maine, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Royal B. Coolbroth, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Mehitable Morrison, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Nancy Drew em 11 de abril de 1854, em Smyrna, Aroostook, Maine, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele viveu em Aroostook, Maine, Estados Unidos da América por quase 10 anos e em Ludlow, Aroostook, Maine, Estados Unidos da América por quase 10 anos. Ele faleceu em 27 de março de 1887, em Pine City, Pine, Minesota, Estados Unidos da América, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em Stillwater, Washington, Minesota, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.Pine City, Pine, Minnesota, United State: паин сити, паин, Миннесота, Соединенные штаты
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hiram Colbroth родился в 1831 г. в местности ширман, арустук, Мэн, Соединенные штаты, его отцу по имени Royal B. Coolbroth было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Mehitable Morrison, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Nancy Drew 11 апреля 1854 г. в местности смирна, арустук, Мэн, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он жил в местности арустук, Мэн, Соединенные штаты около 10 лет и в местности лудлоу, арустук, Мэн, Соединенные штаты около 10 лет. Он умер 27 марта 1887 г. в местности паин сити, паин, Миннесота, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности стиллвэитир, вашингтон, Миннесота, Соединенные штаты.

es.Pine City, Pine, Minnesota, United State: Pine City, Pine, Minnesota, Estados Unidos
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hiram Colbroth nació en 1831, en Sherman, Aroostook, Maine, Estados Unidos, su papá, Royal B. Coolbroth, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Mehitable Morrison, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Nancy Drew el 11 de abril de 1854, en Smyrna, Aroostook, Maine, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Vivió en Aroostook, Maine, Estados Unidos durante unos 10 años y en Ludlow, Aroostook, Maine, Estados Unidos durante unos 10 años. Murió el 27 de marzo de 1887, en Pine City, Pine, Minnesota, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en Stillwater, Washington, Minnesota, Estados Unidos.
